notes.volume: Attach a persistent volume mounted at /data. SQLite DB, migrations state, and generated PDFs all live under /data.
envVars: SEED_ON_BOOT=1 to auto-seed the 3 team users on first boot
SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<pw> to set the initial seed password (else random & logged)
SEED_DEMO=1 to also create a demo client on first boot
